'''鈭歞h-v-z-b''' ('''kadhavzeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:volume|volume]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-v-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:volume|volume]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-v-z-b
|-
! Lemma
| kadhavzeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhavzeboko|thidhavzeboko]] || [[word:jidhavzeboko|jidhavzeboko]] || [[word:shidhavzeboko|shidhavzeboko]] || [[word:kidhavzeboko|kidhavzeboko]]
|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
